zh.lifeSummary: 當Maurice Roche於1440年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克費爾莫易時，他的父親Lord David Fitzmaurice De La Roche The Great the Great the Great41歲，母親Joanna de Burgh25歲。他與Joan Fitzgerald在愛爾蘭蒙斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maurice Roche于1440年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克費爾莫易时，他的父亲Lord David Fitzmaurice De La Roche The Great the Great the Great41岁，母亲Joanna de Burgh25岁。他与Joan Fitzgerald在爱尔兰蒙斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1489年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Roche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Declan, Eamonn, Fergus, Fionnuala, Kevin Patrick, Liam.
Irish (Munster) and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Roach  . Compare   Roch  .

French: topographic name for someone who lived by a rocky outcrop or crag, from Old French roche ‘rock’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the variant Laroche 2. Compare Deroche .

variants.name: Laroche
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Fernand, Normand, Pierre, Jacques, Laurent, Adrien, Cecile, Germain, Marcel.
French:
habitational name from any of numerous places in various parts of France named Laroche or La Roche, from Old French roche ‘rock’, with feminine definite article la.

variants.name: Larocque
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Fernand, Henri, Marcel, Normand, Valmore, Yves, Achille, Amie, Donat, Emile.

French: habitational name from La Ro(c)que, the name of several places in various parts of France, from a regional variant of roche ‘rock’ (see Roche , compare Laroche ), with feminine definite article la. Compare Laroque .

Altered form of southern French Roquebrune or of its variant Rocquebrune: habitational name from Ro(c)quebrune, the name of several places in the southern part of France. The surname Roquebrune is rare in France, while the variant Rocquebrune is extinct there. Compare Larock , Lerocque , Rockburn , and Rocque 1.

variants.name: Rochet
meanings: French: diminutive of   Roche  , a topographic name meaning ‘rock’, or a habitational name from (Le) Rochet, the name of several places in various parts of France.
Catalan: of French origin (see above). This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic and Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Rochat
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Monique, Philippe, Pierre.
French: topographic name from a diminutive of Old French roche ‘rock’ (see Roche 2), or a habitational name from Le Rochat, the name of several places in the eastern part of France.

variants.name: Roach
meanings: English:

of Norman origin, from Old French and Middle English roche ‘rock, cliff, promontory’, sometimes a translation of Stone . The surname may have been topographic, denoting someone who lived on or by a prominent rock or rocky place, or a habitational name for someone who lived or came from a place so named, such as one of those called Roque or Roche(s) in Normandy and neighboring regions, or Roche in Cornwall, Roach Farm in Clyst Hydon (Devon), or Roch in Pembrokeshire (see Roch ).

in Lancashire perhaps referring to the River Roch, which runs through Rochdale; the river name is probably a back-formation from Recedham, an early name for Rochdale recorded in 1086, derived from Old English reced ‘building, house, hall’ + hām ‘village, homestead’. Alternatively, the Lancashire name could be a shortened form of the now rare or extinct surname Rochdale alias Rachedale, Rachdall, a habitational name from Rochdale (Lancashire). From the 18th century onward the name is difficult to distinguish from Roch , borne by Irish migrants to South Lancashire, especially Liverpool.

variants.name: Roquet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Camille.
French: topographic name from a diminutive of roche ‘rock’ (see Roche and Roque ), or a habitational name from (Le) Roquet, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Rochez
meanings: Walloon and French: variant of   Roche   2 or   Rocher  .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

en.lifeSummary: When Maurice Roche was born in 1440, in Fermoy, County Cork, Ireland, his father, Lord David Fitzmaurice De La Roche The Great the Great the Great, was 41 and his mother, Joanna de Burgh, was 25. He married Joan Fitzgerald in Munster, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1489, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maurice Roche est né en 1440, à Fermoy, County Cork, Irlande, son père, Lord David Fitzmaurice De La Roche The Great the Great the Great, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joanna de Burgh, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Fitzgerald à Munster, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1489, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maurice Roche 1440 in Fermoy, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord David Fitzmaurice De La Roche The Great the Great the Great 41 und seine Mutter Joanna de Burgh 25. Er hat in Munster, Irland Joan Fitzgerald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1489 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice Roche è nato il nel 1440 nel Fermoy, County Cork, Irlanda, il suo padre, Lord David Fitzmaurice De La Roche The Great the Great the Great, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Joanna de Burgh, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Fitzgerald nel Munster, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1489, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maurice Rocheが1440年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクフエルモイで生まれた時，父Lord David Fitzmaurice De La Roche The Great the Great the Greatは41歳，母Joanna de Burghは25歳であった。アイルランドムンスターでJoan Fitzgeraldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1489年に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maurice Roche(이)가 1440년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 퍼모이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord David Fitzmaurice De La Roche The Great the Great the Great(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna de Burgh(은)는 25세였다. 그는 아일랜드 먼스터에서 Joan Fitzgerald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice Roche nasceu em 1440, em Fermoy, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, Lord David Fitzmaurice De La Roche The Great the Great the Great, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joanna de Burgh, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Fitzgerald em Munster, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1489, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maurice Roche родился в 1440 г. в местности фирмои, коунти корк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Lord David Fitzmaurice De La Roche The Great the Great the Great было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joanna de Burgh, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Fitzgerald в местности мунстир, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1489 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maurice Roche nació en 1440, en Fermoy, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, Lord David Fitzmaurice De La Roche The Great the Great the Great, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joanna de Burgh, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan Fitzgerald en Munster, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1489, a la edad de 49 años.
